title: lepidium laciniatum
intro: Lepidium laciniatum, commonly known as prickly pepper or prickly mustard, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of compounds like isothiocyanates and glucosinolates. The health benefits of Lepidium laciniatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Lepidium laciniatum is often prepared as a tincture, capsule, or tea, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin irritations and wounds.
